summary: Iteration 83: Verified 11 critical bug fixes. All issues confirmed resolved via code review and UI testing. Landing page has dark bg-[#1A1A2E], KanbanBoard cards have visible text (text-purple-700, text-emerald-600), QuotesTab says 'Create Quote' (singular), LeadDetailModal accepts initialTab prop, Review Contract button sets initialTab to 'contracts', DeliverablesTab uses emerald colors for READY/DELIVERED, Active Commissions shows all non-BOOKED/LOST leads, Client Portal footer says 'Powered by KOLOR STUDIO', Contract creation uses SERVICE_TITLES, loading-spinner class exists in index.css.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.tsx line 27: bg-[#1A1A2E] dark background confirmed
KanbanBoard.tsx line 111: bg-white/80 text-purple-700 for service badge
KanbanBoard.tsx line 167: text-emerald-600 for budget display
LeadDetailModal.tsx line 171: initialTab used to set activeTab
Dashboard.tsx line 599: setSelectedLeadInitialTab('contracts') for Review Contract button
Dashboard.tsx line 1050: initialTab={selectedLeadInitialTab} passed to modal
DeliverablesTab.tsx line 57: READY uses bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700
DeliverablesTab.tsx line 58: DELIVERED uses bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
Dashboard.tsx line 531: Active Commissions filters by projectType === 'COMMISSION' && !['BOOKED', 'LOST'].includes(status)
Dashboard.tsx line 551: Shows all non-BOOKED/LOST leads (removed projectType filter)
ClientPortal.tsx line 962: 'Powered by KOLOR STUDIO' (no 'Visit our website')
contracts.ts lines 233-247: SERVICE_TITLES map for industry-specific contract titles
index.css lines 355-376: .loading-spinner class with kolor-spin animation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 critical issues from the bug fix request have been verified as resolved. Code review confirmed all changes are in place. UI testing confirmed landing page dark background, lead card text contrast, QuotesTab singular text, Google Calendar visibility in Settings, Client Portal footer text. Backend test confirmed contract creation uses SERVICE_TITLES for industry-specific titles.
